text_original: ADs show characters that are LITERAL CHILDREN!! Whoever made this is definitely on a certain list. Disgusting!!
text_zh: 广告里出现的角色完全就是小孩子！！做这个广告的人绝对在某份名单上。真恶心！！
reply_original: Hi there, we take your feedback very seriously. Fantasia strictly prohibits any content involving the exploitation or depiction of minors. Our characters are designed to be adults, and we have filters in place to comply with Google Play policies. Please send screenshots of the ads you saw to support@fantachat.
reply_zh: 你好，我们非常重视您的反馈。Fantasia 严禁任何涉及剥削或描绘未成年人的内容。我们的角色均设计为成年人，并且我们设有过滤器以遵守 Google Play 的政策。请将您看到的广告截图发送至 support@fantachat。
